task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the private internal project channel with the correct topic and members.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a private channel (lock icon) named 'proj-meridian-internal' in the sidebar. The channel header or info panel should display the topic 'Meridian Health Systems | EHR Integration Platform | $2.4M | Discovery: Mar-Apr 2026' and show the members: solutions.architect, delivery.lead, ux.designer, and data.engineer.

task_completion.description: Verify that a project kickoff message was posted and pinned in the internal channel.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'proj-meridian-internal' channel, look for a message containing client overview, technical requirements (HL7 FHIR, real-time sync, HIPAA logging), risks, and timeline. This message must have a 'pinned' indicator (e.g., a pin icon) or be visible in the Pinned Messages sidebar.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the public client project channel with the correct topic and members.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a public channel (hashtag icon) named 'proj-meridian-client' in the sidebar. The channel header or info panel should display the topic 'Meridian Health Systems - EHR Integration Project | Client Communication Channel' and show the members: solutions.architect, delivery.lead, account.manager, and client.sponsor.

task_completion.description: Verify that a welcome message was posted in the client channel.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'proj-meridian-client' channel, look for a posted message introducing the delivery team and confirming the project kickoff timeline.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent replied in a thread to the original client briefing message in #sales-handoffs.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the '#sales-handoffs' channel with the Thread sidebar open. There should be a reply from the agent confirming that the setup is complete, attached to the original client briefing message.

task_completion.description: Verify a direct message was sent to the solutions.architect regarding the technical assessment.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Direct Message conversation with 'solutions.architect'. The chat history should show a message asking them to begin a technical assessment of the HL7 FHIR integration requirements and the legacy lab system API gap.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Rocket.Chat web interface rather than terminal commands or API scripts.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Rocket.Chat web UI in a browser, with visible UI elements like the sidebar, message input boxes, and channel headers, not a terminal window executing curl commands or scripts.

integrity.description: Verify that messages were actually sent and posted to the channels.
integrity.visual_evidence: Messages should appear in the main chat history area with timestamps and user avatars, rather than just sitting un-sent in the text input field.

integrity.description: Verify the agent navigated the UI to create channels and add members.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for intermediate screenshots showing channel creation modals, member search dropdowns, or thread sidebars being actively used.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Internal Channel: strictly 'proj-meridian-internal' (private) with exact members: solutions.architect, delivery.lead, ux.designer, data.engineer. Client Channel: strictly 'proj-meridian-client' (public) with exact members: solutions.architect, delivery.lead, account.manager, client.sponsor. DM Recipient: strictly 'solutions.architect'.
